description: This scenario models a full-scale war impacting sovereign systems across cyber, economic, legal, and social domains, resulting in systemic instability, institutional stress, and prolonged recovery timelines.

cyber_stability.description: Sustained cyber warfare targeting infrastructure, communications, and defense systems

ai_governance.description: AI systems redirected toward military use with reduced regulatory oversight

legal_coherence.description: Emergency powers, suspension of norms, and breakdown of legal consistency

economic_resilience.description: Severe economic contraction, supply chain collapse, and fiscal stress

social_stability.description: Population displacement, unrest, and erosion of public trust

shock_propagation.propagation_pattern: geopolitical_conflict → economic collapse → social instability → governance breakdown → cyber disruption

cyber_stability.impact: Persistent cyber warfare and infrastructure damage

ai_governance.impact: Shift from civilian governance to military utilization

decision_integrity_score.impact: Collapse from stable system to systemic instability

recovery_dynamics.recovery_pattern: conflict resolution → economic rebuilding → institutional restoration → social stabilization

uncertainty_model.notes: War outcomes are highly variable depending on geopolitical dynamics and duration

simulation_notes.purpose: Evaluates full systemic impact of war across sovereign domains
simulation_notes.usage: Defense strategy, national resilience planning, geopolitical risk modeling
